title: Modules Family Schema
description: Phase 1 Step 4 Wave 2 — populated modules family schema. Module registry covering the 20 modules from Contract §8.1 (8 MVP + 12 Later, plus the governance Settings/Site Health entry). Module visibility is keyed on ProjectStage per VR-07 / §4B.2 and is NEVER keyed on ProjectType. Vertical seeding (when applicable) is keyed on ProjectType per VR-08 and is NEVER keyed on ProjectStage. The HBI Assistant module (#20) carries mvp_status: 'Deferred' per VR-19. Field set traces verbatim to fields/families/modules.fields.json. mvp_status binds to the canonical Decision Closure four-value enum (VR-24).

ModuleId.description: Stable module identifier (1–20 for the §8.1 modules). VR-26 referential integrity. Schema bound to §8.3.

RequiredLists.description: List names this module depends on.

RequiredLibraries.description: Library names this module depends on.

RequiredSettings.description: Settings keys this module depends on.

HomeRollupContribution.description: Module contribution to the Project Home / Command Center page.

MvpStatus.description: Decision Closure status. HBI Assistant (#20) is 'Deferred' per VR-19. 8 MVP, 12 Later (Deferred).

Visible.description: Whether module is visible (gated by ProjectStage conditional visibility per §4B.2). VR-07.

visibilityByStage.description: Visibility map keyed strictly by the six ProjectStage values. ProjectType MUST NOT appear as a key here. 'Archived' is ProjectStatus only and is NOT permitted as a key. VR-07, VR-30; Cross-Layer (Schema declares structure; SPFx enforces runtime visibility).

verticalSeeding.description: Optional vertical seeding directive keyed strictly on ProjectType. Vertical seeding NEVER keys on ProjectStage. VR-08.

LastConfiguredDate.description: UTC timestamp of last configuration change.

decisionClosureStatus.description: Canonical Decision Closure Register status — VR-24.

projectStage.description: Bound to enums.schema.json canonicalEnumSets.ProjectStage. 'Archived' is ProjectStatus only and is forbidden as ProjectStage (VR-04).

projectType.description: Bound to enums.schema.json canonicalEnumSets.ProjectType. 'active_construction' (VR-05), 'preconstruction_only', 'warranty_closeout' (VR-06) forbidden as ProjectType.
